title: Section 51
content: The Central Government or such officer or authority as may be authorised by the Central Government in this behalf may at any time require a Board-- (a) to produce any record, correspondence, plan or other document in its possession or under its control; (b) to furnish any return, plan, estimate, statement, account or statistics relating to its proceedings, duties or works; (c) to furnish or obtain and furnish any report.
